## Summary

Describe the change in 2-5 lines.

## Scope

- [ ] Single milestone / focused scope only
- [ ] No unrelated refactors mixed in
- [ ] Public behavior unchanged unless explicitly intended

## Validation (Required)

- [ ] `npm run lint -- --max-warnings 200`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test -- --run`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## CI Required Checks (Must Pass)

- [ ] `CI / Quality Gates`
- [ ] `CI / E2E Tests`
- [ ] `Enterprise Security Audit / security-scan`

## Risk and Rollback

- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Rollback plan:

## Linked Issues / Audit Milestone

- Milestone:
- Issue/Task:
